text: The mention of the hill-shrines here is not borne out by 15.13.

Literally, ‘the heart of all men is perverse and inscrutable; who shall have knowledge of it?’ The Hebrew text gives, ‘the heart of man is perverse and diseased above all things; who shall have knowledge of it?’
The word ‘mankind’ is not in the Hebrew text; its presence in the Latin seems due to a false interpretation.
